title: Migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo
goal: Ship the schema + repo layer for copilot insights. Create migration 0011_copilot_insights.sql with the copilot_insights table per Phase 5 §8.4 (columns: id / company_id / category / severity / title / detail / action_suggestion / action_intent / action_entities_json / dismissed_at / created_at / expires_at; CHECK constraints on category and severity; composite index idx_insights_company_active on (company_id, dismissed_at, expires_at); FK company_id REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE). Implement CopilotInsightsRepo at apps/desktop/src/main/repos/copilot-insights.ts with methods: create, listActive({companyId, category?, severity?, limit?}), dismiss(id), expireStale(now), upsertWithDedup(draft, ctx) (title-similarity via Jaccard bigram > 0.8 merge, category-scoped to prevent blocked-ticket-count drift false merges), getById. Add Drizzle schema to apps/desktop/src/main/db/schema.ts. Same commit flips Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 row from 📋 Planned to 🚧 In progress.
acceptance: Migration file exists at apps/desktop/src/main/db/migrations/0011_copilot_insights.sql with full DDL per Phase 5 §8.4
Drizzle schema.ts extended with copilotInsights table definition + type exports
CopilotInsightsRepo implements all 6 methods with full unit test coverage (+15 tests target per plan doc T1)
Dedup tests include MUST-NOT-MERGE case for blocked-ticket-count drift (e.g. 'Alice has 3 blocked tickets' vs 'Alice has 4 blocked tickets' → different rows)
dist/*.d.ts regenerated via tsc --build if shared-types wire-shape added
pnpm test green across all 6 packages, +15 unit tests net
Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 row status flipped: 📋 Planned → 🚧 In progress (same commit)
Atomic commit: feat(m33): M33 T1 — copilot_insights table + repo
Ledger commit: chore(loki): M33 T1 — commit ledger (<sha>)
